member.name: T:Ex_Stand.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Ex_Stand.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Ex_Stand.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Ex_Stand.StandDataSet
member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.

member.name: T:Ex_Stand.StandDataSet.StandDataTable
member.summary: Represents the strongly named DataTable class.

member.name: T:Ex_Stand.StandDataSetTableAdapters.StandTableAdapter
member.summary: Represents the connection and commands used to retrieve and save data.

member.name: T:Ex_Stand.StandDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager
member.summary: TableAdapterManager is used to coordinate TableAdapters in the dataset to enable Hierarchical Update scenarios

member.name: M:Ex_Stand.StandDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.GetRealUpdatedRows(System.Data.DataRow[],System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Remove inserted rows that become updated rows after calling TableAdapter.Update(inserted rows) first

member.name: M:Ex_Stand.StandDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.UpdateAll(Ex_Stand.StandDataSet)
member.summary: Update all changes to the dataset.

member.name: T:Ex_Stand.StandDataSetTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.SelfReferenceComparer
member.summary: Used to sort self-referenced table's rows
